summary: First end-to-end test of Luminora Learning MVP. Backend pytest suite (21 tests across auth, dashboard, notes, planner, admin, studio, exam, career, tutor SSE) ran with 100% pass — all real gpt-5.2 LLM calls succeeded. Frontend Playwright walk-through of all critical flows (landing 3D tabs, demo login → dashboard, notes create, planner add with shadcn calendar, studio AI lesson generation with 3D, tutor SSE streamed reply, exam generate→answer→submit→100% score, career analyze) all PASS. No runtime errors, no API 5xx, no UI overlays blocking interactions.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py JWT_SECRET is loaded from .env (good) but default value in .env ('luminora_secret_key_change_in_prod_2026') is a placeholder — flag for production replacement, not a test blocker.

llm_routes.extract_json relies on greedy regex and could fail if gpt-5.2 returns multiple JSON blobs; current 502 fallback is fine but consider retry-once on JSONDecodeError to harden studio/exam/career endpoints.

tutor_chat SSE: assistant message is persisted in `finally` block which is correct, but if the client disconnects mid-stream the partial text is still saved. Acceptable for MVP; consider checking length>0 before insert.

admin/stats and admin/users are not role-gated — any authenticated user (e.g. the demo student) can call them. Tests pass because the demo token is accepted, but production should add an admin-only dependency.
Dashboard endpoint hard-codes RECOMMENDED list — acceptable for MVP but should eventually be personalised.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of critical flows verified (login, dashboard, notes, planner, studio AI, tutor SSE, exam full cycle, career analyze, landing 3D)

test_credentials: demo@luminora.ai / Demo@123 (student) and admin@luminora.ai / Admin@123 (admin) — both seeded by backend startup and confirmed working.
seed_data_creation: None required; backend seed_admin() creates demo + admin accounts on startup. Tests use TEST_/random emails for new-user paths and self-clean within their flows.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_luminora_backend.py is the regression entry point. Real LLM calls take ~5-30s each so the full suite runs in ~100s; do not set timeouts below 60s for /studio/generate, /exam/generate, /career/advise, /studio/explain-part, /tutor/chat (SSE). Exam UI offers question counts 5/8/10 only (not 3) — use exam-count-5 in Playwright. Planner uses a shadcn Popover+Calendar (NOT browser native date input); the planner-date testid is a button — the date defaults to today, which is sufficient for happy-path tests. Tutor.jsx streams via fetch+ReadableStream and parses 'data: {json}' lines manually; UI renders deltas in real time and was observed working. Admin endpoints currently accept any authenticated token (see code review note).
rca of the issue: No bugs to RCA — MVP is functioning end-to-end.
